category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides Vala bindings for radare, a reverse engineering framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official GitHub repository name are valabind.
docs_sources: The official repository README is the best available official documentation surface found for valabind.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/radare/valabind; per instructions it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Vala bindings for radare; source_facts.executables lists valabind CLI tools.
